home.eyebrow: What would you like to collect today?
home.title: Bring your favorite characters home
home.subtitle: Figures, acrylic stands, art books, and limited goods in a relaxed shopping flow.
home.note: Cart updates will let you know right away

guide.title: First time here?
guide.desc: Learn about pre-order vs in-stock, payment, and pickup

work.listSubtitle: Pick a title to see its activities
work.activitiesEmpty: No activities for this title yet

orderForm.title: Create order
orderForm.noProducts: No products are available for this activity

agreement.title: Order notes
agreement.ruleContact: Please confirm your name and Gmail. We will use them to contact you about this order.
agreement.ruleConfirmation: Submitting this form does not mean the order is confirmed. Staff will confirm quantities and prices later.
agreement.ruleZeroQuantity: Products with quantity 0 will not be included in the order items.
agreement.checkbox: I have read and agree to the terms above

items.fullPayment: Full payment by bank transfer is required.
items.minorConsent: For minors: please obtain consent from your legal guardian. Once payment is made, it will be treated as confirmation that parental or guardian consent has been obtained, and the order cannot later be canceled or refunded for lack of permission.
items.paymentDeadline: Payment deadline: after the group order is confirmed, an order confirmation email will be sent. Please complete payment within 3 days after receiving it, or your slot will be released automatically.

items.transparentQuote: Transparent pricing: a second payment plus domestic shipping is required.
items.refundFormula: Refund estimate: total amount received - total amount of successfully purchased items = refund amount.
items.deliveryMethods: Delivery methods: Ship711, home delivery, and Taichung meetup are available.

items.internationalShipping: International shipping may involve minor bumps or box damage. Please order carefully if box condition is very important to you.
items.afterSales: After-sales policy: proxy purchases are customized transactions. Except for major defects, returns or exchanges for personal reasons such as color differences or ordering mistakes are not accepted.
items.arrivalTime: Arrival time: based on the official announced schedule.
items.customerService: If you have any questions, please message our official Line customer service: ＠680javyx

success.title: Form submitted
success.message: This order was generated with frontend mock data. Backend API is not connected yet.

errors.agreeRequired: Please agree to the terms above first
errors.gmailRequired: Please enter a valid Gmail address
errors.bankRequired: Please enter the last 5 digits of the account (5 digits)
errors.productsRequired: Please select at least one product
errors.submitFailed: Unable to submit. Please try again later

product.title: Products
product.emptyForActivity: No products are available for this activity

toast.mixedActivityMessage: The first MVP supports one activity per order. Please finish or clear the current cart first.
toast.submitFailedMessage: Unable to create the order. Please try again later.
toast.addFailedMessage: Unable to add to cart. Please try again later.

auth.title: Continue with LINE
auth.description: The first MVP uses a mock LINE session. The official LINE Login API can be connected later.
auth.notFriendMessage: Please add our LINE Official Account as a friend before entering the shop.
